# TradingJournal.com

> Last updated: March 2026

> Independent trading journal reviews and comparisons. We help traders find the right journaling software.
> Every platform is tested hands-on with real trade data and scored across 8 categories.
> Our TJ Score (1-10) is the average of: Broker Support, Reporting & Analytics, Journaling Tools,
> Usability & Design, Advanced Features, Pricing & Value, Community & Trust, and Support & Documentation.
> We analyzed 1,201 Trustpilot reviews across all 5 platforms. We are not affiliated with any trading journal company.

## Rankings (2026)

1. TradeZella — 9.4/10 TJ Score — 4.8/5 Trustpilot (835 reviews) — $24–$49/mo — 500+ brokers — Best overall — Only journal with backtesting (11+ years), trade replay, 50+ analytics reports, strategy templates, and built-in education in one platform
2. TraderSync — 7.8/10 TJ Score — 4.7/5 Trustpilot (312 reviews) — ~$16–$40/mo (annual) — 950+ brokers — Best mobile app (iOS & Android) — Cypher AI coaching
3. Edgewonk — 7.0/10 TJ Score — 4.7/5 Trustpilot (40 reviews) — $197/year (~$16/mo) — 200+ importers — Best for trading psychology — Tiltmeter quantifies emotional cost
4. Trademetria — 6.3/10 TJ Score — 4.0/5 Trustpilot (5 reviews) — Free–$39.95/mo — 140+ brokers — Best free option — AI Coach on Pro plan — No mobile apps
5. Tradervue — 5.2/10 TJ Score — 2.6/5 Trustpilot (9 reviews) — Free–$49.95/mo — 80+ brokers — Free plan for stocks/ETFs only — Community trade sharing — No AI features
